# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] PowerShell syntax check passed.
- [ ] Pester passed.
- [ ] DryRun completed when behavior changed.
- [ ] Generated reports and logs were not staged.

## Safety

- [ ] No user data folders are targeted.
- [ ] No cloud sync folders are targeted.
- [ ] No browser cookies, passwords, history, or profile data are targeted.
- [ ] Any cleanup behavior still requires explicit `-Execute`.
